name: 沈词

appearance.face: 俊美如玉，清冷端方，薄唇微抿
appearance.distinguishing_features: 琥珀色冷眸，偶尔流露痛色与温柔

visual_reference: Handsome young Chinese scholar 20-25, cold amber eyes with sharp jawline, elegant pale features, tall slender build, long black hair neatly tied with jade guan, wearing dark blue historical scholar robes with white accents, aloof yet heartbroken expression, cinematic ancient Chinese drama, ultra detailed
personality: 清冷端正、尖锐刻薄、情感压抑
desire: 保护儿子、让陆姝仪顺遂、最终挽回妻子
flaw: 偏执冷漠、不会表达真心、容易误会
arc: 从冷待报复到疯狂纠缠、跪求不放手
scene_presence: 贯穿全剧，与女主对戏最多，从提亲到江南深夜爬床
